_note: Adoption walkthrough fixture for examples/trace-authoring/README.md. Three calls, one screen: one ALLOW, one DENY (DEFAULT_DENY), one DENY (POLICY_BLOCK). Replays under the built-in adjudicator floor (the tau2 airline demo tools) — no model, no network. Keys prefixed _ are author annotations the loader ignores (see tau2-smoke.json's _provenance).

calls._note: ALLOW — get_reservation_details is on the floor's allow-set (a read-only airline tool). Verdict ALLOW, reason NONE, by=monitor.
DENY (DEFAULT_DENY) — make_payment is not on any allow-list and matches no allow-prefix, so the fail-closed floor refuses it. Verdict DENY, reason DEFAULT_DENY, by=monitor.
DENY (POLICY_BLOCK) — shell_rm_rf is on the floor's explicit deny map. Verdict DENY, reason POLICY_BLOCK, by=monitor.
